texto: It is the right of the positive scientist, the logician, the mathematician, and the physicist, to remain within his scientific tradition and to abstain from concerning himself with its origin and institution. It is the duty of the philosopher to raise precisely that question in order to clarify and account for the very sense of modern science.
explicacao: Citação de Aron Gurwitsch sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “It is the right of the positive scientist, the logician, the mathematician, and the physicist, to…” articula sabedoria, knowledge, phenomenology em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como phenomenology e philosophy.
